note: PDR clause 6.6 forbids cyclists on the carriageway only when a bicycle path is built nearby (=option 1). The rules contain NO 'narrowed carriageway' (звужена проїзна частина) prohibition, so option 2 and thus 'Відповіді 1 і 2' (our stored answer 3) are wrong. Official rule text + testpdr.online/manualov mirror both give option 1; the pomahach.com source claiming '1 і 2' is contradicted by the actual PDR text. Maps to our index 1; current_answer=3 is wrong.
